feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Service Layer endpoint /b1s/v2/Attachments2 - BadFormat error
entry.content:
Hi,

I'am trying to upload a attachment unsing Java Apache HTTP Client version 5 and keep getting the folwowing error:

{
   "error" : {
      "code" : "-1",
      "message" : "BadFormat"
   }
}

Can someone help me find what I could be missing on this test class:

import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue;

import java.io.File;
import java.io.FileInputStream;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.security.KeyManagementException;
import java.security.KeyStoreException;
import java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException;
import java.security.UnrecoverableKeyException;
import java.security.cert.CertificateException;
import java.time.Instant;
import java.util.Objects;

import javax.net.ssl.SSLContext;

import org.apache.commons.io.IOUtils;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.classic.methods.HttpGet;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.classic.methods.HttpPost;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.entity.mime.HttpMultipartMode;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.entity.mime.MultipartEntityBuilder;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.classic.CloseableHttpClient;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.classic.HttpClientBuilder;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.io.PoolingHttpClientConnectionManager;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.impl.io.PoolingHttpClientConnectionManagerBuilder;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.routing.RoutingSupport;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.ssl.DefaultClientTlsStrategy;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.ssl.HostnameVerificationPolicy;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.ssl.NoopHostnameVerifier;
import org.apache.hc.client5.http.ssl.TlsSocketStrategy;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.ClassicHttpResponse;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.ContentType;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.Header;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.HttpEntity;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.HttpHost;
import org.apache.hc.core5.http.io.entity.EntityUtils;
import org.apache.hc.core5.ssl.SSLContexts;
import org.apache.hc.core5.ssl.TrustStrategy;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;

class TestAttachments2
{
	protected static final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(TestAttachments2.class);
	
    private static final String TARGET_URL = "https://127.0.0.1:90000/b1s/v2/Attachments2";
    
    
    void testUpload()
    {
    	final Instant startInstant = Instant.now();
    	
        try
        {
			final HttpGet httpGet = new HttpGet(TARGET_URL);
			String name;
			
			name = "/tmp/test.pdf";
			
			File f = new File(name);
			
			byte[] byteArray = IOUtils.toByteArray(new FileInputStream(name));
			
			final HttpHost host = RoutingSupport.determineHost(httpGet);
			
			final MultipartEntityBuilder builder = MultipartEntityBuilder.create();
			builder.setMode(HttpMultipartMode.LEGACY);
			builder.addBinaryBody("file", byteArray, ContentType.APPLICATION_PDF, f.getName());
			
			final HttpEntity entity = builder.build();
			
			final HttpPost post = new HttpPost(TARGET_URL);
			
			post.setHeader("Accept", "*/*");
			post.setHeader("Cookie", "ROUTEID=.node3; B1SESSION=xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx");
			post.setHeader("Authorization", "Bearer xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx");
			
			post.setEntity(entity);
			
			try( CloseableHttpClient client = buildClient())
			{
				final ClassicHttpResponse response = client.executeOpen(host, post, null);
				logger.info("response.getCode(): {}", response.getCode());
				
				final HttpEntity repoEntity = response.getEntity();
				
				if (Objects.nonNull(repoEntity))
				{
					logger.info("\n\n{}\n\n", EntityUtils.toString(repoEntity));
				}
				
				if (response.getHeaders() != null)
				{
					for (Header item : response.getHeaders())
					{
						logger.info(item.getName() + ": " + item.getValue());
					}
				}
			}
			
			
        }
        catch (Exception e)
        {
        	logger.error(e.getMessage(), e);
        }
		
		assertTrue( startInstant.isBefore(Instant.now()) );
    }
    
    private CloseableHttpClient buildClient() throws KeyManagementException, UnrecoverableKeyException, NoSuchAlgorithmException, KeyStoreException, CertificateException, IOException
    {
		final TrustStrategy acceptAllCerts = (cert, authType) -> true;
		
		final SSLContext sslcontext = SSLContexts.custom()
				.loadTrustMaterial(acceptAllCerts)
				.build();

		final DefaultClientTlsStrategy tlsStrategy = new DefaultClientTlsStrategy(sslcontext,
				HostnameVerificationPolicy.CLIENT, NoopHostnameVerifier.INSTANCE);
		
		final PoolingHttpClientConnectionManager connManager = PoolingHttpClientConnectionManagerBuilder.create()
				.setTlsSocketStrategy((TlsSocketStrategy) tlsStrategy)
				.build();
		
		final CloseableHttpClient client = HttpClientBuilder.create()
		        .setConnectionManager(connManager)
		        .build();
		
		return client;
    }
}

 I use Sl4J and Logback for logging and bellow are the XML to configure the logging framework:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<configuration>
	<include resource="org/springframework/boot/logging/logback/defaults.xml"/>
	
	<statusListener class="ch.qos.logback.core.status.NopStatusListener" />
	​
	<springProperty scope="context" name="springAppName" source="spring.application.name"/>
	<!-- Example for logging into the build folder of your project -->
	<property name="LOG_FILE" value="${BUILD_FOLDER:-build}/${springAppName}"/>​

	<!-- Appender to log to console -->
	<appender name="console" class="ch.qos.logback.core.ConsoleAppender">
		<filter class="ch.qos.logback.classic.filter.ThresholdFilter">
			<!-- Minimum logging level to be presented in the console logs-->
			<level>DEBUG</level>
		</filter>
		<encoder>
			<pattern>%d{dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm:ss.SSS} [%X{X-Trace-Id}] [%thread] %-5level %logger{36}.%M:%line - %msg%n</pattern>
			<charset>utf8</charset>
		</encoder>
	</appender>
	
	<logger name="org.apache.http" level="DEBUG"/>
	<logger name="org.apache.hc.client5.http" level="debug"/>
	​
	<root level="INFO">
		<appender-ref ref="console"/>
	</root>
</configuration>

 Important to note that the tests with Postman worked as expected.

entry.title: 2026 Fixed Assets - Not Showing Values on Fixed Assets tab
entry.content:
Hi,
I need some assistance, none of my fixed assets are in 2026 except for one asset that was entered in 2026, but they are there for 2025.  I am looking at one and it shows depreciation an ending deprecation to 10/2032.

I ran the depreciation for 01/2026 but nothing appears except for the asset that was entered in 2026.

I also ran the Fiscal Year Change from 2025 to 2026 and from 2026 to 2027 but still nothing appears.

Can someone please help with this?


Brian Branco

entry.title: Question Regarding Thai Tax Localization Add-on with China Base Localization
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I would like to seek clarification regarding the Thai Tax Localization add-on in SAP Business One.

In Thailand, the Thai Tax Localization is typically deployed under the UK base localization provided by SAP. However, we currently have a scenario where a customer’s system is installed under the China base localization.

We would like to understand whether there are any differences or limitations in terms of:

  • Installation requirements

  • Technical configuration

  • Compatibility or dependency at the localization level

  • System validation or support constraints

Specifically, is the Thai Tax Localization technically supported or compatible with a China based installation?
Are there any known restrictions or recommended approaches in this scenario?

We would greatly appreciate any guidance from the SAP technical team or anyone who has experience with a similar setup.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: How to cleanly refund a partial A/R Down Payment Request balance without dummy invoices?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently implementing SAP Business One for a German company (GmbH) and we've hit a architectural wall regarding down payment refunds.

The Business Scenario:

  1. We create an A/R Down Payment Request for a large amount (e.g., 100,000 EUR). Note: We specifically use 'Request' instead of 'Invoice' because the business does not want to generate preliminary tax liabilities/deferred VAT before the customer actually pays.

  2. Customer pays 100% upfront -> Incoming Payment is created based on the Request. VAT is correctly recognized per German localization rules.

  3. Over the next few months, the customer makes several orders. We create A/R Reserve Invoices and draw down from the available down payment balance (e.g., utilizing 60,000 EUR in total).

  4. After 6 months, the contract ends, and we need to refund the remaining unused balance (40,000 EUR) back to the customer.

The Problem: To refund the money, we create an Outgoing Payment (Payment on Account) for 40,000 EUR. However, when we try to clear the balances via Internal Reconciliation, we hit the hardcoded system restriction: "A regular payment cannot be reconciled with a payment from a down payment request [Message 3821-45]"

Why standard workarounds are rejected:

  • SAP Note 3196811 workaround (Dummy Invoices): Creating technical Service A/R Invoices (to a clearing account) to absorb the balance, followed by an A/R Credit Memo, is strictly rejected by the client's CFO. It pollutes the sales ledger and confuses the reporting.

  • Manual Journal Entries (MJE): Highly undesirable in the German localization due to strict GoBD audit rules and the risk of messing up the VAT return (UStVA) when manually reversing tax groups.

  • Switching to A/R Down Payment Invoices: Not an option for this specific process, as it generates financial/tax postings before the customer makes a final decision to transfer funds.

My Question: Has anyone found a cleaner, more elegant workaround or best practice to refund a partial balance of an A/R Down Payment Request (while keeping VAT compliant) without using dummy marketing documents or risky manual journal entries?

Any insights or creative approaches would be highly appreciated!

entry.title: SAP BUSINESS ONE for SQL installation is failing
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We are trying to install the SAP B1 10.0 for SQL 2019 on Windows server and the installation is failing in the server tools authentication action step of post-install is failing.

Please help us providing your suggestions in resolving this issue.

Thanks,

Nirmala

entry.title: The SAP Business One Client Application suddenly closes without error.
entry.content:
The SAP Business One Client Application closes automatically without displaying any errors during certain additions and updates in Windows 11 and Windows 10 versions, and does not appear in the dump file.

Has anyone experienced this issue and resolved it?

The SAP B1 version we use in our company is

SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.300) FP 2508 (64-bit).

The add-ons are:

CompuTec - CompuTec.Start SA 3.0.1.524

Boyum Solutions - B1 Usability Package 2025.08.01.1

entry.title: Invoice delivery audit
entry.content:
Hi,

In sap business one our current workflow is to create an A/R invoice+payment then give the customer his purchased items, some customers don’t pick their order the same day which makes the actual stock in the warehouse different than that on SBO.

Is it possible to make the delivery after the invoice I tried using A/R Reserve invoice which the workflow I need but in the same time it doesn’t decrease the stock which may cause two customers buying the same quantity in the warehouse.

In short I want to use the delivery as audit only, with no actual effect on the system.

Any thoughts?

entry.title: Trial Balance TurnOver Negative Amount in PLD
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it possible to format Trial Balance Turn over Negative to Positive amount in Print Layout Design?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: No matching record found ‘Branches’ (OBPL) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]
entry.content: When accessing the document settings option, the error No matching record found ‘Branches’ (OBPL) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]. This happens when I try to open the screen. Does anyone know how to fix it?

entry.title: Tds outgoing payment : Add multiple rows
entry.content:
My client is located in india, so he's using TDS
I have many TDS entries on the system on many Sections for both assesse types and for 2 different locations
When he tries to perform TDS outgoing payment he is not able to create multiple rows  to add other TDS entries for a different assessee type or a different section

Only one row is possible with one section and one assessee type which make it very long to do different payment for each assessee and each section.

Anyone can help please ?

entry.title: Payment Terms Tab Grayed Out In Business Partner Data
entry.content:
In test environment, I've recently added a new payment term and assigned it to one of our business partners. I didn't realize that I changed some setting that made the payment terms tab grayed out. 

This seems to be a user profile issue since other user can access payment terms. 
I check my authorization and i have full access to Business Partner Master Data including Payment terms under it. 

I checked my licenses and i got the same from the users who can accessed it. 

I checked our live environment and i can access it. 

It's only in test environment and my profile that has payment terms grayed out

How to access the payment terms tab?

entry.title: SAP B1 trying to load dimensions for Fixed Assets using DTW
entry.content:
I am using SAP B1 on SQL v10

I have loaded the Fixed Assets (about 1k) properly using DTW

but I need to add the dimension to the Fixed Asset 

the DTW templat for the table does not appear to work properly

has anyone had any success in mass loading dimension for Fixed Assets in SAP B1?

what am I missing

entry.title: Tracking Technician Cost in Project Management in SAP Business One Without Affecting Financial Repor
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on a Project Management setup in SAP Business One for an air-conditioning sales and servicing company.

The requirement is to track technician costs against specific Project Stages. One employee may work on multiple sub-projects or stages under a single Financial Project.

If we link technician costs through A/P documents or Journal Entries, it may result in duplicate cost impact in financial reports, since the company already posts the monthly salary through payroll entries.

Therefore, I would like to find an approach to track technician costs per project/stage for internal monitoring purposes only, without affecting financial postings.

What would be the best or simplest method to track technician costs for specific projects or stages in SAP Business One?

Thank you in advance for your advice.

Best Regards,

Khat

entry.title: SAP Business One 10 Upgrade From 2308 to 2602
entry.content:
I am trying to upgrade SAP Business One 10 from 2308 to 2602. When I try to run the setup.exe, I was able to connect to SLD and it upgraded the client, DTW, SDK etc. and failed in SLD.  I had the backup of SLD and tried to run the setup.exe again, Now I am unable to connect SLD from both setup.exe and from web. I am struck and I am not sure, how to fix this issue.  I am getting the below error message from setup.exe and when I try to access from web, I am getting blank page. 

Cannot connect to SLD Server: Verify site user password or check proxy server connection settings

I am entering the right password and there is no proxy server in our environment. 

Please help.

entry.title: Unable to import AP Credit Memo with Withholding tax in sap b1 DTW
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 
I am facing a challenge to import AP Credit memo transaction (Service) with Withholding Tax in SAP Business One 10.0
My template is as below : 
ORPC : 

DocNumDocEntryDocTypeDocDateDocDueDateCardCodeNumAtCardDocTotalDocRateCommentsOriginalRefNoOriginalRefDate
DocNumDocEntryDocTypeDocDateDocDueDateCardCodeNumAtCardDocTotalDocRateCommentsRevRefNoRevRefDate
1012 dDocument_Service2026030920260309S0001Rev 62601673  Single test cost cost reversal54820260309


RPC1 : 

ParentKeyLineNumItemDescriptionQuantityPricePriceAfterVATLocationCodeCurrencyAccountCodeTaxCodeWTLiableLineTotalSACEntryBaseEntryBaseTypeBaseLine
DocNumLineNumDscriptionQuantityPricePriceAfVATLocCodeCurrencyAcctCodeTaxCodeWtLiableLineTotalSacEntryBaseEntryBaseTypeBaseLine
10120Testing With Wt Code  2INR1151002CG+SG@18Y100001550180

RPC5 : (Withholding tax)

ParentKeyLineNumWTCodeWTAmountSysWTAmountFCWTAmountTaxableAmountinSysTaxableAmountFCTaxableAmountAppliedWTAmountSysAppliedWTAmountFCAppliedWTAmountBaseDocEntryBaseDocLineBaseDocType
DocNumLineNumWTCodeWTAmntSCWTAmntFCWTAmntTxblAmntSCTxblAmntFCTaxbleAmntApplAmntSCApplAmntFCApplAmntBaseAbsEntBaseLineBaseRef
10120TC-2  118  11800  118550018

Regards,
Satinath B.

entry.title: RSP SAP Channel Failed
entry.content:
Hi Jitin

Why RSP SAP Channel communicattion Failed when the S Technical User is still Active and Password Tested successful in SAP Portal? 

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: 480000112 - Batch/serial number 12345 selected in row 1 does not exist; specify a valid batch number
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to run a cURL command via cmd to post in service layer for a delivery note with a sales order as base document. The lines items are serialized. The cURL command is as follows:

{
"DocDate": "2026-03-09",
"DocDueDate": "2026-03-09",
"DocumentLines": [
{
"BaseType": 17,
"BaseEntry": 49,
"BaseLine": 0,
"Quantity": 1,
"SerialNumbers": [
{"InternalSerialNumber": "12345", "BaseLineNumber":0, "Quantity":1.0}
]
}
]
}

The error I am getting is as follows:

{
"error" : {
"code" : -5002,
"message" : {
"lang" : "en-us",
"value" : "480000112 - Batch/serial number 12345 selected in row 1 does not exist; specify a valid batch/serial number"
}
}
}

I appreciate your help.

Thank you,

Pascale

entry.title: SBO Mailer
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

                  In SAP B1 SBO mailer, how to disable or edit the standard table format? I check multiple ways, like changing the document summary layout and also checking any XML contained in the mailer file inside SAP's program files. But nothing will work. Please, help me. Is there any way to hide the table I attached the table picture in this chat. And also, is it possible to add a document's field data, like AR Invoices Customer ref number, in the SBO mailer.

entry.title: oInventoryGenEntry creation error
entry.content:
SAPbobsCOM.Recordset recordSet = (SAPbobsCOM.Recordset)company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.BoRecordset);
recordSet.DoQuery($"SELECT TOP 1 DocEntry FROM OWOR WHERE Comments like '%{process.UserKey}%'");
if (!recordSet.EoF) // Ellenőrzés, hogy van-e eredmény
{

string docEntry = recordSet.Fields.Item("DocEntry").Value.ToString();

SAPbobsCOM.ProductionOrders productionOrder =
(SAPbobsCOM.ProductionOrders)company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oProductionOrders);

int docEntryInt = int.Parse(docEntry);
bool found = productionOrder.GetByKey(docEntryInt);
Console.WriteLine($"DocEntry: {docEntryInt}, Found: {found}");
int productionOrderDocEntry = productionOrder.AbsoluteEntry;
if (process.Output == true)
{
recordSet.DoQuery($"SELECT TOP 1 DocEntry FROM OIGN WHERE Comments like '%{process.UserKey}%'");
if (recordSet.EoF)
{
SAPbobsCOM.Documents inventoryGenEntry = (SAPbobsCOM.Documents)company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oInventoryGenEntry);
SAPbobsCOM.Items item = (SAPbobsCOM.Items)company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oItems);
if (item.GetByKey(process.Material))
{
DateTime StartDate;
if (DateTime.TryParse(process.StartTime, out StartDate))
{
inventoryGenEntry.DocDate = StartDate;
}
inventoryGenEntry.Comments = "dSuite azonosító: " + process.UserKey + "\n" + process.Remarks;
inventoryGenEntry.DocObjectCode = SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oInventoryGenEntry;
//inventoryGenEntry.DocumentsOwner = 44;
inventoryGenEntry.Lines.BaseType = 202;
inventoryGenEntry.Lines.BaseEntry = productionOrderDocEntry;
//inventoryGenEntry.Lines.BaseLine = 0;

inventoryGenEntry.Lines.Quantity = process.Quantity;
int result = inventoryGenEntry.Add();
if (result != 0)
{
Console.WriteLine($"Error: {company.GetLastErrorDescription()}");
Console.WriteLine($"Error: {company.GetLastErrorCode()}");
}
else
{
Console.WriteLine("Késztermék bevételezés sikeresen rögzítve a termelési rendeléshez!");
}
}
else
{
Console.WriteLine("Nem található cikk a jelentéshez");
}
}
else
{
SAPbobsCOM.Documents inventoryGenEntry = (SAPbobsCOM.Documents)company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oInventoryGenEntry);
docEntry = recordSet.Fields.Item("DocEntry").Value.ToString();
docEntryInt = int.Parse(docEntry);
found = inventoryGenEntry.GetByKey(docEntryInt);
Console.WriteLine($"DocEntry InventoryGenEntry: {docEntryInt}, Found: {found}");
SAPbobsCOM.Items item = (SAPbobsCOM.Items)company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oItems);
if (item.GetByKey(process.Material))
{
if (inventoryGenEntry.GetByKey(docEntryInt)) // A megfelelő sor alapján betöltjük a ProductionOrder objektumot
{
bool lineExists = false;
for (int i = 0; i < inventoryGenEntry.Lines.Count; i++)
{
inventoryGenEntry.Lines.SetCurrentLine(i);

if (inventoryGenEntry.Lines.ItemCode == process.Material.ToString())
{
lineExists = true;
break; // No need to continue checking
}
}

if (!lineExists)
{
inventoryGenEntry.Lines.Quantity = process.Quantity; // Bevett mennyiség

// Kapcsolat a termelési rendeléshez
inventoryGenEntry.Lines.BaseEntry = productionOrderDocEntry; // Termelési rendelés DocEntry
inventoryGenEntry.Lines.BaseType =(int)SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oProductionOrders; // Alap dokumentum típusa

int result = inventoryGenEntry.Update();
if (result != 0)
{
Console.WriteLine($"Error: {company.GetLastErrorDescription()}");
}
else
{
Console.WriteLine("Késztermék bevételezés sikeresen rögzítve a termelési rendeléshez!");
}
}
}
}
}
}

The above is my code, and it always throws the same error, the employee is not exist or inactive.
"Error: (59001) [59/1/DocEntry/57294] * Nem létezo vagy inaktív dolgozóra nem lehet rögzíteni bizonylatot!
Error: -1116"
But I checked and there is an employee for my user which is loged in by the DI API, 
I also tried the InventoryGenEntry.DocumentOwner = 44 which is the userid in OUSR, and OHEM table too, but got the same error.

entry.title: SAP B1 log de modificaciones Revalorización de inventario
entry.content:
Tengo el caso en donde al momento de generar una revaluación de inventario no se visualiza dicho el cambio dentro del log de modificaciones del articulo como un registro adicional. 

El cambio al costo se aplica de forma correcta, pero en el log de modificaciones no se registra en la fecha en el que se realizó.

Saben si hay algo que se pueda hacer para que se visualice el registro de ese cambio?

Gracias de antemano
